query:
SELECT s.sceneIndex, s.modelAssignment, s.videoUrl, s.status, s.errorMessage
FROM musicVideoScenes s
JOIN musicVideoJobs j ON s.jobId = j.id
WHERE j.userId = (SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY j.createdAt DESC, s.sceneIndex ASC
LIMIT 20;
